title: Create reminder with notification to call client
excerpt: I want to somehow receive a notification in xx days to call back a client regarding a specific question that may arise on a project  (i.e. collect additional sales data; request additional records, etc)

posts.author: JNo (jim nosich)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to somehow receive a notification in xx days to call back a client regarding a specific question that may arise on a project (i.e. collect additional sales data; request additional records, etc)

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: You could have a “Call On” Date column and an “When Call On arrives Then notify Someone” automation.
